etymology.description: Depicts two entangled ropes -> to entangle, to intertwine -> original form of įģū(įģū) (jiÅŦ, "correct")
etymology.interpretation: äļĐ(äļĐ) (jiÅŦ, "twist") is a pictogram representing two ropes intertwined, which signifies the idea of twisting or entangling. It is the original form of įģū(įģū), which retains a related meaning of correcting or organizing.
